summary: Strong performance highlighted by an intense “The Other One” and a moving Brokedown Palace, though recording details are unclear
review: Fans praise the show for its sustained, high‑energy jam on The Other One and the emotionally charged closing with Brokedown Palace dedicated to the Kesey family. No reviewer comments on the audio source or fidelity, leaving the technical quality unverified.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 4‑star reviews highlight standout songs and emotional moments, while one 3‑star review calls it average; recording quality is not discussed, so the rating reflects mainly show strength.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention sound clarity, mix issues, or source type, leaving technical quality indeterminate.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A powerful middle‑set jam on The Other One followed by a heartfelt, tearful close with Brokedown Palace dedicated to the Kesey family.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Intense, sustained middle jam where Jerry 'doesn't want to stop', showcasing strong guitar work.
